00:18. Action: Pick up pot. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean). pot is inside robot gripper.
00:21. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is inside robot gripper.
00:22. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is inside robot gripper.
00:25. Action: Put pot in sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is inside sink. pot is on the right of soap bottle. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:28. Action: Toggle on faucet. Visual observation: faucet (turned on), pot (filled with water and clean), sink. pot is inside sink. pot is on the right of soap bottle. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:31. Action: Toggle off faucet. Visual observation: pot (filled with water and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is inside sink. pot is on the right of soap bottle. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:32. Action: Pick up pot. Visual observation: pot (filled with water and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. pot is inside sink. pot is on the right of soap bottle. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:36. Action: Move to house plant. Visual observation: house plant (empty), sink. house plant is on top of third countertop. nothing is inside robot gripper.

[Observation at the end of 00:37]
Action: Pour liquid from pot into house plant. Visual observation: house plant (empty), sink. house plant is on top of third countertop. nothing is inside robot gripper.

Q: Infer from [Robot actions and observations before 00:37] or [Observation at the end of 00:37], briefly explain what happened at 00:37 and what caused the failure.

response: At 00:37, the robot tried to pour water into the house plant, but the plant remained empty because the robot was no longer holding the pot.
